title: 高松宮記念の後に・カワイイ頂上決戦へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan emerges victorious at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but by utilizing her secret yet
simple plan of focusing on the broader potential
audience for cuteness than hero shows...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan narrowly defeats Biko Pegasus in the
Cutie ♪ Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, all of Curren Chan's strongest rivals
will be gathering for the final battle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll be Curren Chan's second time running the the
Sprinter's Stakes, and she's determined to stand
at the top.
